title: The Day and Night Kings
description: On pages 6–9, this part focuses on the day and night kings within the Duke Inuarashi and Master Nekomamushi storyline.
scene: On Zou, the Straw Hats and their allies uncover the Mink Tribe’s suffering, Sanji’s disappearance, Raizo’s secret, and the road toward both Wano and Big Mom.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: GyaAA AAA!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: gyahahahaha! Women, children, even the elderly no mercy!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Did we come here simply to converse and chat...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Guaa aahh!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Jack
dialogue.text: DIMWIT, RAIZO'S A NINIA!! Not a "SamURAI"!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: GinPlummy?

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: Shut up, Sir Sheepshead!! Samurai is a catch-all term for Warriors from the Wano Country! You're focusing on the wrong thing!!

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: No sir, we came here to capture a single samurai.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I have but one demand !!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Bring Ra120 to me!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: That's absurd...!! We've been telling them that Raiza is not here, and yet...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Then so be it... turn this country inside out, "pleasures" !!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: GyaA haHahaha haha haha!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Hmm?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: GYAA AAAAH !!!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Gah...!! What just happened?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: What the hell was that!? Wait, it's...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: that old fart from before!!! And that brat!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Uhaha haha!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Aurgh, it hurts, Dammit!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: This country has no "weak- Lings"!! Every single milk

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Is a born Warrior!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Even our infants are able to fend for them- selves!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Are you lot really sure you can turn the citizens of our entire country into your enemies?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: The abilities of our musketers, each of whom has been through further training, are beyond words.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: If we end up fighting, both our armies will suffer greatly! If you insist on looking for this somebody...

dialogue.speaker: Inuarashi
dialogue.text: At the very least, please talk this out with our Duke!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: TALK...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I refuse.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: "Gifters") Go forth !!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Hell yeah !!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: What's with their bodies...?!

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: destroy this country and find the Samurai!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: ...We were unable to reason with them...

dialogue.speaker: Wanda
dialogue.text: The clash began, and before we knew it our peaceful "Claw City"...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: turned into a battlefield in an instant.

summary: The Day and Night Kings: On Zou, the Straw Hats and their allies uncover the Mink Tribe’s suffering, Sanji’s disappearance, Raizo’s secret, and the road toward both Wano and Big Mom.
